case_title: MARINA PALEY VS. LAKE MERCED HILLS HOA ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LAKE MERCED HILLS HOA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2022 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-29-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-29-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MARINA PALEY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LAKE MERCED HILLS HOA AKA LAKE MERCED HILL RECREATION AND MANAGEMENT ASSOCIATION, INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KATHERYN KOZUCH, PRESIDENT LAKE MERCED HILL ASSOCIATION. DEFENDANT A COMMON INTEREST MANAGEMENT SERVICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DEBBIE MCGRAW, COMMUNITY ASSO MANAGER (FTB SUSPENDED). PLAINTIFF (LEFT) EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $50) SERVED MAR-07-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAKE MERCED HILLS HOA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT COMMON INTEREST MANAGEMENT SERVICES

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PALEY, MARINA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LAKE MERCED HILLS HOA COMMON INTEREST MANAGEMENT SERVICES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY PALEY, MARINA AS TO DEFENDANT LAKE MERCED HILLS HOA COMMON INTEREST MANAGEMENT SERVICES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $100) SERVED MAR-07-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COMMON INTEREST MANAGEMENT SERVICES
